metadata.description: DNA — Domain Notation of Anything. Declarative, typed notation for agentic behavior. Plugin distribution surface for Claude Code.

plugins.name: dna
plugins.description: The dna-sdlc-cli skill — story-first, in-repo SDLC tracking via the `dna sdlc` CLI (AC/DoD guard, plan gate, narration, test gate, Work-Item git trailers, story pr).
